inspirationReferences.category: Structured panel organization, clean information architecture
elementsAdapted: Top-aligned navigation bar with tab-style view switching
Dense card grid layout for projects and ideas (3-column grid)
Settings organized as tabbed panels with clean form sections
Centered content column with max-width constraint for readability
Property-based metadata display on project cards (key-value rows)

inspirationReferences.category: Monitoring density, dashboard repetition, data-rich panels
elementsAdapted: Dense 4-column KPI grid with sparkline bar charts inside each tile
Multi-panel dashboard layout with 3 equal-width data panels
Small type with monospace metadata and tight vertical spacing
Summary strip at bottom with secondary aggregate metrics
Health status rows with colored indicator pips and service names

inspirationReferences.category: Application ergonomics, utility-first interaction, visual depth
elementsAdapted: Elevation-based visual hierarchy: varying box-shadow depths create layered stone effect
Protruding tablet-style navigation tabs that extend above the top bar baseline
Hover interactions that lift elements (translateY) to reinforce physical depth metaphor
Geological gradient background: CSS linear-gradient darker at bottom, lighter at top
Chat interface with alternating elevation depths creating visual conversation rhythm

uniqueDesignElements: Geological strata depth model: content at 3 elevation levels with external box-shadows casting downward
Stone tablet navigation: top bar tabs that protrude upward with shadow underneath, active tab has amber underline glow
Strata reveal animation: content emerges from below via translateY + opacity at 400ms ease-out
Gradient background: linear-gradient from lighter slate at top to deep charcoal at bottom (sedimentary layers)
Priority-as-elevation: higher-priority items have larger box-shadows (elevation-3 vs elevation-1)
Dense multi-column grid: 3-4 column layouts throughout (dashboard KPIs, project cards, idea tiles, kanban lanes)
